notes: MeanOccupancyPerActiveCU is resident/running waves per active CU, not active-CU coverage.
Durations are filtered to the final train_step range by default; bucket rows report rank/source max, mean, min, and all-source sums.
Backward SharedKV C4/C128 split is not emitted by default because sharedkv_bwd.* marker ranges are not reliably nested inside per-layer backward hooks in this trace.
rocprof counter collection is intrusive; use this for hardware character and bucket ranking, not clean throughput.
